nodes.label: Call std::back_inserter()
nodes.detail: std::transform( entrypoint_args.begin(), entrypoint_args.end(), std::back_inserter(entrypoint_argv), [](const std::string& arg) -> const char* { return arg.c_str(); });

nodes.label: std::cerr << "Cannot run an engine that failed creation." << std::endl
nodes.detail: std::cerr << "Cannot run an engine that failed creation." << std::endl;

nodes.label: std::cerr << "Cannot run an engine more than once." << std::endl
nodes.detail: std::cerr << "Cannot run an engine more than once." << std::endl;

nodes.label: std::cerr << "Cannot get plugin registrar on an engine that isn't running; " "call Run fi...
nodes.detail: std::cerr << "Cannot get plugin registrar on an engine that isn't running; " "call Run first." << std::endl;

nodes.label: Call FlutterDesktopEngineSetNextFrameCallback()
nodes.detail: FlutterDesktopEngineSetNextFrameCallback( engine_, [](void* user_data) { FlutterEngine* self = static_cast<FlutterEngine*>(user_data); self->next_frame_callback_(); self->next_frame_callback_ = nullptr; }, this);
